name: PLACENTA PREVIA
definition: abnormally low implantation of ovum with the placenta covering all / part of internal cervical

demographics.Frequency: 0.5% of all deliveries; 3-5% of all pregnancies complicated by 3rd trimester

dominant_finding: abnormal position of placenta infringing on cervical os
discriminating_features: abnormal position of placenta infringing on cervical os

MR: abnormal position of placenta infringing on cervical os

clinical.Cx: secondary to premature detachment of placenta from lower uterine segment
